title: Subway Sneak
objective: Grab the blue diamond without touching the police light.

objective: Reach the handbag while avoiding the angry dog.

title: Mall Escape
objective: Take the wallet and slip behind the escalator.

title: Museum Laser
objective: Steal the ruby through moving laser beams.

title: Bank Counter
objective: Pull the cash bag before the guard turns around.

title: Rooftop Chase
objective: Swing across the roof to collect the golden watch.

title: Airport Scan
objective: Slip the passport case past the scanner.

objective: Collect the chip stack while dodging spotlights.

objective: Grab the briefcase before the doors close.

title: Diamond Vault
objective: Crack the path and touch the diamond core.

objective: Take the magic coin while cats block the path.

objective: Steal the keycard from the desk.

objective: Collect the energy orb while robots patrol.

title: VIP Party

title: Underground Tunnel
objective: Reach the hidden treasure with limited energy.

objective: Steal the keys and escape the cell block.

objective: Beat the boss guard and claim the golden NFT.
